title: US-Israel-Iran conflict: Saudia extends flight cancellations across 8 major cities through March 4
summary_full: Saudia has extended flight cancellations on several key regional routes until March 4th due to ongoing regional developments. The airline is prioritizing safety and directly notifying affected passengers. Travelers are urged to verify their flight status before reaching the airport.
